---
title: "Health Impact of Distance Learning on High School Students"
description: "The aim of this survey is to determine the health impact of distance learning on high school students during the COVID-19 pandemic."
image: featured.png 
categories:
  - PowerBI Dashboard
---

```{=html}
<a href="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiY2ZhNjUzN2YtYmZhNS00ZWFmLWEzNWYtNTM0NzgxNmNjYzc2IiwidCI6ImRmODY3OWNkLWE4MGUtNDVkOC05OWFjLWM4M2VkN2ZmOTVhMCJ9&pageName=ReportSection " class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Live Dashboard</a>
```
